description: Interactive skeuomorphic personnel file folder. Click to open reveals two-page vertical spread with fold crease at viewport center. Contains card pile: profile card with polaroid-bordered photo, evidence exhibit cards, sticky notes, and decorative elements (CSS-only binder clip, paperclips, pushpins, washi tape, cassette tape with reels/screws, floppy disk with shutter/label, tri-color star stickers). Warm kraft paper palette on dark desk background with polka dots.
final_delivery_requirement: Export as single HTML file. Uses Google Fonts (Caveat, Special Elite, Courier Prime, Inter). Profile photo and polaroid landscape photo inline as base64 JPEG. Replace {{PROFILE_PHOTO_BASE64}} (2 occurrences) and {{POLAROID_PHOTO_BASE64}} (1 occurrence).
